g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the core RAG pipeline in the Second Brain system')
sendPrompt('How does knowledge representation and ontology design apply to the Second Brain?')
sendPrompt('What does information theory have to do with building a Second Brain?')
sendPrompt('How do cognitive science and memory models inform Second Brain design?')
sendPrompt('What distributed systems challenges come up in a personal knowledge system?')
sendPrompt('What does observability mean for an AI knowledge pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What data engineering patterns are relevant to the Second Brain ingestion pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does HCI and interface design affect a Second Brain tool?')
sendPrompt('What are the security and privacy considerations for a personal AI knowledge base?')
